englishDefinitions: (idiomatic) By design, as opposed to by accident; intentionally; deliberately.
(now rare) In order to (do something); with the objective that.
persianTranslation: (اصطلاحاً) بر اساس طرح، برخلاف تصادفی. عمدا؛ به عمد
(اکنون نادر) به منظور (انجام کاری)؛ با این هدف که
examples: That wasn't an accident! You did it on purpose!
